{{Relic Infobox|Pollinous Core|2}}
{{R|Pollinous Core||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Colossal Flower|2}} event. Every 4 turns, it will draw 2 additional cards at the start of the turn.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Colossal Flower|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Reach Deeper}} option twice and then {{Frame|Enter the Center}}, losing a total of 18 HP.
